Blubber.name: Blubber
Blubber.description: Reduces damage from fire and ice type moves by 50%

DangerZone.name: Danger Zone
DangerZone.description: Same type moves are 50% more powerful at low HP

Shock Immunity.name: Shock Immunity
Shock Immunity.description: Immune to Shock and takes 50% from lightning attacks

guts.name: Guts
guts.description: Raises Attack by 50% if afflicted by a status

daunt.name: Daunt
daunt.description: Lowers enemy Attack on switch in

MindFray.name: Mind Fray
MindFray.description: Lowers enemy Special Attack on switch in

agile.name: Agile
agile.description: Boosts speed at the end of every turn

healingaura.name: Healing Aura
healingaura.description: Heals self 10% Max HP at the end of each turn
